data_streams.notes: None;Fib modality: fib mode: Normal This record has been updated to include intended measurements. Fiber connections are repeated for fibers with multiple channels. Disconnected fibers are marked with fiber_name 'disconnected'.

ffmpeg_parameters.ffmpeg_output_args: -vf "scale=out_range=full,setparams=range=full:colorspace=bt709:color_primaries=bt709:color_trc=linear" -c:v h264_nvenc -pix_fmt yuv420p -color_range full -colorspace bt709 -color_trc linear -tune hq -preset p3 -rc vbr -cq 18 -b:v 0M -metadata author="Allen Institute for Neural Dynamics" -maxrate 700M -bufsize 350M -f matroska -write_crc32 0

stimulus_epochs.notes: The duration of go cue is 100 ms. The frequency is 7500 Hz. Amplitude is 76dB. The total reward consumed in the session is 767.2 microliters. The total reward including consumed in the session and supplementary water is 1.953 milliliters.

lens.name: Behavior Video Lens Bottom of face

filters.name: beamsplitter
filters.notes: 493/574 nm BrightLine dual-edge standard epi-fluorescence dichroic beamsplitter

daqs.name: harp behavior board
daqs.notes: Left lick spout and Right lick spout, as well as reward delivery solenoids are connected via ethernet cables

calibrations.description: Spot check of water calibration for Lick spout Left. The input is the valve open time in seconds and the output is the volume of water delievered in microliters. The valve open time was selected to produce 2ul of water. This measurement was used to check the previous calibration, and was not used to set the calibration.

evaluations.name: Channel data present
evaluations.description: Per-channel check that each CSV file contains data. A FAIL indicates a hardware failure (e.g. faulty RedCMOS trigger cable). Channels with no CSV file are excluded (not an error).

metrics.name: Green channel CSV contains data
Iso channel CSV contains data
Red channel CSV contains data

evaluations.name: Data length check
evaluations.description: Pass when data_length for Green/Iso/Red are same and the session is >15min

metrics.name: Data length same
Session length >15min

evaluations.name: Complete Synchronization Pulse
evaluations.description: Pass when 1)rising and falling give the same length; 2)sync Pulse number equals data length

metrics.name: Rising/Falling of Sync pulses same length (Value: Rising edge of synch pulse)
Data length same as one of data length (Value: Falling edge of synch pulse)

evaluations.name: No NaN values in data
evaluations.description: Pass when no NaN values in the data

metrics.name: No NaN in Green channel
No NaN in Iso channel
No NaN in Red channel

evaluations.name: CMOS Floor signal
evaluations.description: Pass when CMOS dark floor is <265 in all channel

metrics.name: Floor average signal in Green channel
Floor average signal in Iso channel
Floor average signal in Red channel

evaluations.name: No sudden changes in signals
evaluations.description: Pass when no sudden change in signal

metrics.name: Max 1st derivative

evaluations.name: Single data file per channel in the session
evaluations.description: Pass when the session folder has only one data per channel

metrics.name: Number of data files per channel
metrics.description: When FIP-Bonsai workflow starts/stops multiple times, it would generate multiple CSVs, RawMovie files, etc

evaluations.name: Alignment check
evaluations.description: Quality control of fiber photometry data alignment. Verifies proper alignment of timestamps and presence of significant response to Go Cue.

metrics.name: Inter-pulse Intervals
metrics.description: Comparison of inter-pulse intervals between RAW and FIP data

metrics.name: Trace Comparison (green channel, ROI 0)
metrics.description: Comparison of G0 traces before and after alignment

metrics.name: GoCue PSTH (Peri-stimulus time histogram) for green channel
metrics.value: Significant activity difference pre/post Go Cue
metrics.description:
Peri-stimulus time histograms around GoCue events. 
Might fail as a false positive because signal is empty or intended measurement will NOT be responsive to GoCue or reward

metrics.name: GoCue PSTH (Peri-stimulus time histogram) for isosbestic channel
metrics.value: Significant activity difference pre/post Go Cue
metrics.description:
Peri-stimulus time histograms around GoCue events. 
Might fail as a false positive because signal is empty or intended measurement will NOT be responsive to GoCue or reward

metrics.name: GoCue PSTH (Peri-stimulus time histogram) for red channel
metrics.value: Significant activity difference pre/post Go Cue
metrics.description:
Peri-stimulus time histograms around GoCue events. 
Might fail as a false positive because signal is empty or intended measurement will NOT be responsive to GoCue or reward

metrics.name: Truncated timestamps
metrics.description: Number of HARP timestamps truncated at start & end for alignment

metrics.name: Retained gaps in timestamps
metrics.description: Retained gaps in timestamps because they occurred mid-session

metrics.name: Time difference between FIP start & end times in CSV vs JSON
metrics.description: Typically (first CSV timestamp - JSON start_time) is in [0.9, 1.2] and (last CSV timestamp - JSON end_time) is in [0, 1.2]

metrics.name: Significant response to Go Cue
metrics.description: Check for a significant difference in mean activity between the 500 ms before and after the Go Cue.

metrics.name: Significant response Delay before Go Cue
metrics.description: Check for a significant difference in mean activity between the 500 ms before and after 0.1s before the Go Cue.

evaluations.name: dropped frames check
evaluations.description: pass when there are no dropped frames

metrics.name: dropped frames
dropped frames for camera BottomCamera
dropped frames for camera SideCameraRight

evaluations.name: Basic Configuration
evaluations.description: pass when researcher name is not default name, and code repo is clean

metrics.name: researcher name
metrics.description: Experimenter name should not be set to the default value of "the ghost in the shell"

metrics.name: untracked local changes
metrics.description: Whether the code base had untracked changes, and if so, which files

evaluations.name: Side bias
evaluations.description: pass when average side bias is less than 0.5

metrics.name: average side bias
metrics.description: average side bias should be less than 0.5

evaluations.name: Lick Intervals
evaluations.description: pass when lick intervals <100ms are less than 10 percent of licks

metrics.name: Left Lick Interval (%)
metrics.description: % of lick intervals < 50ms. These indicate grooming bouts

metrics.name: Right Lick Interval (%)
metrics.description: % of lick intervals < 50ms. These indicate grooming bouts

metrics.name: Cross Side Lick Interval (%)
metrics.description: % of lick intervals < 50ms. These indicate grooming bouts

metrics.name: Artifact Percent (%)
metrics.description: % of lick intervals less than 0.5ms. These indicate electical artifacts

evaluations.name: Preprocessing using method 'bright'
evaluations.description: Review the preprocessing plots to ensure accurate baseline (dF/F) and motion correction.

metrics.name: Baseline correction of ROI 0 using method 'bright'
metrics.description: Baseline $$F_0(t)$$ fit with  $$b_{inf} \cdot (1 + b_{slow}\exp(-t/t_{slow}) + b_{fast}\exp(-t/t_{fast}) + b_{rapid}\exp(-t/t_{rapid})) \cdot (1 - b_{bright}\exp(-t/t_{bright}))$$

metrics.name: Motion correction of ROI 0 using method 'bright'
metrics.description: Maximum regression coefficient

metrics.name: Baseline correction of ROI 1 using method 'bright'
metrics.description: Baseline $$F_0(t)$$ fit with  $$b_{inf} \cdot (1 + b_{slow}\exp(-t/t_{slow}) + b_{fast}\exp(-t/t_{fast}) + b_{rapid}\exp(-t/t_{rapid})) \cdot (1 - b_{bright}\exp(-t/t_{bright}))$$
